description: Default window permissions. fs is write-only: the app only ever exports files (CSV/Word) to user-chosen locations — it never reads user files, so fs:read-all was removed (read access remains only for app-specific dirs via fs:default). The static write scope stays broad because the save dialog lets users pick any directory, that choice is remembered across same-day restarts (localStorage), and exports create Sold/Unsold subfolders — all outside the runtime scope the dialog plugin grants. fs:default also keeps the webview-data-folder deny protections.
